research.title: Claude Opus 4.8 Dynamic Workflows — Spawning Hundreds of Parallel Subagents in Claude Code (Hands-On)
research.whyTrending: Opus 4.8 shipped 28 May 2026 with a Claude Code research preview that lets one orchestrator session spawn up to 1,000 parallel subagents, each with its own context window, then verify against the repo's own test suite. It's the single biggest agentic-coding capability jump of the year and the blog has zero coverage. Huge fresh search intent, perfect for a code-heavy hands-on with a real repo-scale migration example.
